title: chore: remove unused old-polly legacy folder
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes `apps/polly/old-polly` (35 files), a legacy duplicate of `apps/polly`
- No references to `old-polly` exist anywhere else in the repo

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Shedding the old exoskeleton
gist.blurb: We've swept away the legacy old-polly folder to keep the codebase tidy. Less clutter, more room for new ideas!
gist.summary: Removed the unused apps/polly/old-polly legacy directory, deleting 35 redundant files from the repository.
gist.impact: Developers will enjoy a cleaner, lighter codebase with no duplicate legacy files to navigate around.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee cleaning up old dusty boxes or sweeping away cobwebs in a cozy attic/storage room. Nomnom creature eating the old files.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up dusty old floppy disks and folders in a cozy wooden attic. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old papers labeled 'LEGACY'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
